response.reasoning: Bogdan has over 12 years of full-stack experience, far exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with consistent work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and modern tooling like Docker and Git. He has direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq, which matches a key required skill. His work with AWS CDK, MongoDB, and Kubernetes aligns with cloud and containerization requirements. He has contributed to testing frameworks (Vitest-like via Trial, Fluent-Asserts) and has strong architectural exposure across microservices, real-time systems, and open-source platforms. His background includes Kotlin/Java/DLang for backend services, and he has led cross-functional collaboration on product features. However, Nest.js is not explicitly mentioned, and Vitest is only implied through testing framework experience. His German language skill is basic, which may be a minor concern in a Berlin-based enterprise role. His education is a BS in CS, meeting the requirement. His open-source contributions and workshops demonstrate strong communication and process improvement skills.

response.justification: Bogdan exceeds core experience requirements with extensive full-stack work, AI-agent exposure, and strong architectural and process skills.
